ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the garment belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the garment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the garment type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the garment type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., YXS, YM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., back length, chest) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the measurement belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the unit was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manufacturer, retailer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_sizes" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the garment-size combination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the garment-size combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the garment-size combination was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the garment-size combination is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id", "size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inventory entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role-permission combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role-permission combination was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role-permission combination is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the production activity */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of garments produced */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the production activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
